description.zh: 亚洲第一个民主共和国。孙中山先生在西方三权分立基础上，融合中国传统的考试和监察制度，创立五权宪法：行政、立法、司法、考试、监察五院分权制衡。国民大会代表全体国民行使政权。三民主义（民族、民权、民生）为建国纲领。
description.en: Asia's first democratic republic. Dr. Sun Yat-sen augmented Western separation of powers with traditional Chinese examination and censorate systems, creating the Five-Power Constitution: Executive, Legislative, Judicial, Examination, and Control Yuans. The National Assembly represented the people's sovereignty. The Three Principles of the People guided nation-building.
